value_signal: Weekly stipend of $3,850 USD / $2,310 GBP / $4,300 CAD plus benefits, mentorship, and compute/research support.
eligibility_or_region_notes: The posting targets applicants over 18 with under two years of full-time work experience, a strong technical background, fluent Python, and full-time availability; the listed locations are London, Ontario, remote-friendly United States, and San Francisco.
deadline_or_currentness: Rolling applications are open for cohorts starting in July 2026 and beyond; the page says the next cohort is expected to start in late September.
evidence_gate: Application receipt plus later interview or selection notice and stipend or fellowship onboarding proof.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a one-page fit memo and a resume/project bullet pack using only public AI Monkey facts.
human_must_do_next: Human owner must confirm the fit and complete the application and any interview steps.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The stipend is real, but no application acceptance or paid onboarding has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If the profile is a truthful fit, prepare a short evidence bundle and application outline before any submission.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after accepted application or visible stipend delivery.
